utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: (1) health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs, (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs, (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs, (4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs, and (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The final coverage plan provided includes all of these five items. Each section includes detailed coverage description and respective cost information. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified with appropriate details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main policy areas and several additional services. For health coverage, the selected plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical)', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under both physical health and mental health in the ground-truth ratings, each rated 8. For property coverage, the plan does not specify a name but matches the description of 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (standard-level protection with electronics coverage, liability, and natural disasters), rated 8. For travel coverage, the plan name is not explicitly stated, but the features (medical evacuation, adventure sports, emergency coordination, business travel protection) match 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel insurance, rated 7. The additional services include telemedicine (Telemedicine Services, rating 10), wellness programs (Wellness Programs, rating 10), concierge services (Concierge Services, rating 8), premium medical network addon (Premium Medical Network, rating 10), and adventure travel addon (Adventure Travel Coverage, rating 6). Therefore, each element of the final plan maps directly to these ratings.
